steps.title: Identify the slope of the linear function
steps.content: The function $$w(t)=280-5t$$ is in the form $$w(t)=mt+b$$ where $$m$$ is the slope. Here the coefficient of $$t$$ is $$-5$$, so $$m=-5$$.

steps.title: Interpret the slope as the draining rate
steps.content:
A negative slope means the volume decreases. The magnitude $$|m|=5$$ gives the volume lost per second. Thus the tank drains $$5$$ milliliters each second.
D is correct.
